ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department under which the agency operates */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the agency */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year for the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_admins" (
  "agency_admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency administrator */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the administrator belongs to */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "admin_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_admins_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cardholders" (
  "cardholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cardholder */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the cardholder */,
  "first_initial" TEXT /* First initial of the cardholder */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the cardholder belongs to */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Credit card number of the cardholder */,
  "card_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the credit card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cardholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cardholders_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency that made the transaction */,
  "cardholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cardholder who made the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor for the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "mcc" TEXT /* Merchant category code (MCC) for the transaction */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the transaction (e.g., V) */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type (foreign key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_description FOREIGN KEY ("description") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_mcc FOREIGN KEY ("mcc") REFERENCES mcc_codes ("mcc_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_cardholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("cardholder_id") REFERENCES cardholders ("cardholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_vendor FOREIGN KEY ("vendor") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "vendor_address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "vendor_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mcc_codes" (
  "mcc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MCC */,
  "mcc_name" TEXT /* Name of the MCC */,
  "mcc_description" TEXT /* Description of the MCC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reversals" (
  "reversal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reversal */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being reversed */,
  "reversal_date" TEXT /* Date the reversal was made */,
  "reversal_amount" REAL /* Amount of the reversal */,
  "reversal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the reversal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reversal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reversals_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Detailed data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, accountant, auditor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)
column_names: Department under which the agency operates
Total budget allocated to the agency
Unique identifier for each agency administrator
ID of the agency the administrator belongs to
